[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 010110111 6
1 111000111 6
2 100000000 1
3 111010010 5
4 101000010 3
5 100000110 3
6 100100011 4
7 011110101 6

01 10 100000000 1 match 2
12 21 111010010 5 match 3
23 32 101000010 3 match 4
34 43 100000110 3 match 5
45 54 100100011 4 match 6
56 65 011110101 6 match 7
67 76 010000111 4
70 07 111000111 6 match 1

02 20 011010010 4
13 31 010010000 2
24 42 001000100 2
35 53 000100101 3
46 64 111010110 6
57 75 001110010 4
60 06 101000000 2
71 17 011000111 5

14 41 110010110 5
25 52 101100111 6

47 74 101010001 4
50 05 110110101 6
61 16 001000000 1
72 27 100010101 4

26 62 110010010 4
37 73 001010111 5
